series_metadata.series_description: Formerly FIS-2 (019-0002). This record series contains resolutions and fee schedules adopted by counties pursuant to Section 120.33(A). To be reimbursed for appointed counsel expenditures, each county must adopt a resolution to pay counsel and establish

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain one copy of each county's current version and all previously submitted version(s) of resolutions or fee schedules in the County Reimbursement operating area permanently., Paper: Permanent
